benefits.description: 4-6 weeks ahead of schedule at first PT appointment (July 3rd, 16 days post-op). Able to fully supinate and pronate wrist with little discomfort. Bumped up in recovery protocol at second PT appointment.
Discomfort minimal and pain nearly non-existent. Never encountered level of swelling seen in others.

protocol_notes: Ruptured distal bicep tendon on May 30th, surgery June 17th. Started peptide protocol that night. Also on TRT 150mg/week (75mg on Sunday and Thursday). Concurrent use of 5g citrulline malate 2x daily, 5g creatine monohydrate 2x daily, 25g collagen peptides once daily. Returned to gym 2 days post-op, worked legs, core, lower back and cardio in cast and sling. Cleared to squat barbell up to 225lbs by July 14th.
